deliveryFaq.question: How fast is delivery?
deliveryFaq.answer: Most orders in Islamabad and Rawalpindi are delivered within 24 hours. Same-day delivery may be available for select areas — contact us on WhatsApp at 0300-6096599.

deliveryFaq.question: What areas do you cover?
deliveryFaq.answer: We deliver across Islamabad sectors (F, G, I series and more) and major Rawalpindi areas including Bahria Town, DHA, and Saddar. See our delivery areas page for the full list.

deliveryFaq.question: How do I order a 19L bottle?
deliveryFaq.answer: Message us on WhatsApp at 0300-6096599 with your address and quantity. We offer dispenser-compatible 19L bottles for homes and offices at PKR 650 per bottle.

deliveryFaq.question: Is there a minimum order?
deliveryFaq.answer: No strict minimum for most areas. Bulk and office orders receive priority scheduling and may qualify for discounted rates.

deliveryFaq.question: What payment methods do you accept?
deliveryFaq.answer: We accept cash on delivery, JazzCash, and bank transfer. Payment details are confirmed when you place your order on WhatsApp.

deliveryFaq.question: Is there an empty bottle deposit?
deliveryFaq.answer: For 19L bottles, a refundable deposit may apply for first-time customers. Returning customers can exchange empty bottles on their next delivery at no extra charge.

deliveryFaq.question: How do I order on WhatsApp?
deliveryFaq.answer: Save 0300-6096599, send a message with your area, address, quantity of 19L bottles, and any accessory needs. We confirm your order and delivery time within minutes.

deliveryFaq.question: How much does 19L water cost in Islamabad?
deliveryFaq.answer: Everdrop 19L dispenser bottles are PKR 650 each with doorstep delivery included for most Islamabad and Rawalpindi areas. Office bulk orders may receive priority scheduling.

deliveryFaq.question: Are 19L bottles compatible with standard dispensers?
deliveryFaq.answer: Yes. Everdrop 19L bottles use the standard neck size compatible with most home and office water dispensers. Manual pumps and gravity dispensers are also available on request.

deliveryFaq.question: Do you offer office bulk delivery?
deliveryFaq.answer: Yes. We deliver scheduled 19L bottles to offices, clinics, gyms, and co-working spaces across Islamabad and Rawalpindi. Contact us for recurring delivery schedules.

deliveryFaq.question: What is the water quality and mineral content?
deliveryFaq.answer: Everdrop is pure mineral water sourced and bottled to preserve essential minerals for a crisp, refreshing taste. Every batch meets strict quality standards for purity and safety.

deliveryFaq.question: Are there delivery fees by area?
deliveryFaq.answer: Standard delivery to most Islamabad and Rawalpindi sectors is included in the bottle price. Remote or industrial zones may have a small delivery fee — we confirm this on WhatsApp before dispatch.

deliveryFaq.question: Can I get same-day delivery?
deliveryFaq.answer: Same-day delivery is available for select sectors when you order before noon. Message us on WhatsApp with your area and we confirm availability immediately.

deliveryFaq.question: What is your replacement or refund policy?
deliveryFaq.answer: If you receive a damaged or incorrect order, contact us on WhatsApp within 24 hours. We arrange a free replacement or refund at no extra cost.

deliveryFaq.question: Do you deliver on weekends and holidays?
deliveryFaq.answer: Yes. Everdrop operates 24/7 including weekends and public holidays. Delivery times may vary on peak days — we always confirm your slot on WhatsApp.

deliveryFaq.question: Can I schedule recurring weekly delivery?
deliveryFaq.answer: Yes. Many homes and offices set up weekly or bi-weekly 19L delivery schedules. Tell us your preferred day and quantity on WhatsApp and we handle the rest.

deliveryFaq.question: Do you sell water dispenser accessories?
deliveryFaq.answer: Yes. Manual pumps, gravity dispensers, bottle stands, and home/office setups are available from PKR 450. Enquire on WhatsApp or visit our products page.

deliveryFaq.question: How do I return empty 19L bottles?
deliveryFaq.answer: Hand empty bottles to our delivery team on your next order. We collect and exchange them at no extra charge for returning customers.

deliveryFaq.question: How do I contact Everdrop for support?
deliveryFaq.answer: Call 0300-6096599, email everdrop599@gmail.com, or message us on WhatsApp anytime. We are based at F11/1, Islamabad and respond within minutes.
